name: loom-playbooks

interface.shortDescription: Optional Loom workflow playbook skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Loom Playbooks provides workflow coordinator skills and expects loom-core to supply using-Loom doctrine and canonical record skills.
defaultPrompt: Use loom-core for using-Loom doctrine and canonical record skills.
Use Loom Playbooks for optional workflow coordinator routes when installed.
